text.title: GitLab CI/CD Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end with decision gates.

step.name: decide-apply-vs-skip
step.action: Decision tree on platform + complexity + DevSecOps requirement.
step.decision-gate: If decision != apply, STOP and document `skip-this-methodology` rationale.

step.name: model-stages-and-jobs
step.action: List stages; for each job add needs forming a DAG.

step.name: secure-variables
step.action: Audit variables; set protected + masked on sensitive ones.

step.name: add-scanners-and-envs
step.action: Add SAST/secret/dep scanners; configure environments with tiers.

step.name: validate-and-commit
step.decision-gate: If validator exits non-zero, return to the previous draft step and fix violations.
